DAT.Common.GMOnly: Dungeon Alchemist Toolkit: only a GM can do that.
DAT.Hub.Title: Dungeon Alchemist Toolkit
DAT.Hub.Intro: Import a Dungeon Alchemist export and manage stairs/portals between levels.
DAT.Hub.MenuHint: Open the Dungeon Alchemist Toolkit hub (import + stairs tools).
DAT.Hub.ImportHint: Turn a folder of DA floor exports into one native multi-level Scene.
DAT.Hub.AddStairsHint: Place a linked entrance/exit on the canvas (stairs, teleport, or trap).
DAT.Hub.ManagerHint: List, find, edit, and delete this scene's stairs and portals.
DAT.Importer.GMOnly: DA Importer: only a GM can import scenes.
DAT.Importer.NoPairs: DA Importer: no Dungeon Alchemist floor pairs (image/video + .json) found in folder.
DAT.Importer.Orphans: DA Importer: skipped {count} unpaired file(s) — an image/video with no matching .json, or vice-versa (see console for the list).
DAT.Importer.MixedMaps: DA Importer: this folder appears to contain {count} maps ({maps}). Each folder should hold only one map; floors from different maps will be mixed into one scene.
DAT.Importer.JsonFailed: DA Importer: failed to load JSON ({error}).
DAT.Importer.FolderFailed: DA Importer: could not create destination folder ({error}).
DAT.Importer.CopyFailed: DA Importer: failed to copy media "{name}" ({error}).
DAT.Importer.BadDimensions: DA Importer: the first floor's data has invalid map dimensions — width/height/grid must be positive numbers (got width={width}, height={height}, grid={grid}).
DAT.Importer.SceneCreateEmpty: DA Importer: Scene.create returned no document — check the console for validation errors.
DAT.Importer.Created: DA Importer: created "{name}" — {levels} level(s), {walls} wall(s), {lights} light(s).
DAT.Importer.RoofDetected: DA Importer: detected {count} roof layer(s) and pre-marked them as Roof — {names}. Use "Show advanced columns" to review.
DAT.Importer.Oversize: DA Importer: {count} floor(s) exceed ~50 MB ({names}). Large videos slow scene loads; consider importing referenced-in-place (Copy Media off).
DAT.Importer.BadElevation: DA Importer: level(s) {levels} have bottom ≥ top. Fix the elevation values before importing.
DAT.Stairs.NoLevels: DA Stairs: this scene has no Levels — import or add levels first.
DAT.Stairs.InProgress: DA Stairs: a placement is already in progress.
DAT.Stairs.CreatedTeleport: DA Stairs: created {count} linked region(s) (same level — teleport).
DAT.Stairs.LinkSelectTwo: DA Stairs (link): select exactly two Regions on the Regions layer first (click one, Shift-click the other), then run this again.
DAT.Stairs.AlreadyPortal: DA Stairs: one of those regions is already a portal — unlink it first (use the Stairs Manager).
DAT.Stairs.Linked: DA Stairs: linked the two selected regions.
DAT.Stairs.GoneRegion: DA Stairs: that region no longer exists.
DAT.Stairs.GoneLink: DA Stairs: that link no longer exists.
DAT.Stairs.UseHint: Walk your token onto the stairs to use them.
DAT.Stairs.StepEntrance: New {mode} "{label}" — Step 1 of 2: place the ENTRANCE
DAT.Stairs.StepExit: New {mode} "{label}" — Step 2 of 2: place the EXIT
DAT.Stairs.StepHint: Pick the floor, then click (or drag) on the canvas to place. Esc or Cancel to stop.
DAT.Region.NoTarget: DA Region: select at least one target level.
DAT.Region.PickHint: Click to drop a region, or drag to draw its footprint. Press Escape to cancel.
DAT.Region.Title: Add Multi-Level Region
